sqlMap.insert:
/* CarMgtDAO.insertCar */
insert into tb_car ( CAR_NO , CAR_TYPE , COM_CD , BIZ_NO , USER_HOME_ADDR , USER_WORK_ADDR , DISTANCE , DEPT_CD , DUTY , USER_ID , USER_NM , STATE , CAR_GET_DATE , CAR_DISPOSE_DATE , use_yn , ins_id , ins_dt ) values ( #carNo# ,#carType# ,#comCd# ,#bizNo# ,#userHomeAddr# ,#userWorkAddr# ,#distance# ,#deptCd# ,#duty# ,#userId# ,#userNm# ,#state# ,#carGetDate# ,#carDisposeDate# , 'Y' ,#sessionId# ,getdate() ) select scope_identity() as carIdx
sqlMap.update: /* CarMgtDAO.updateCar */ update tb_car set car_no = #carNo# ,car_type = #carType# ,com_cd = #comCd# ,biz_no = #bizNo# ,user_home_addr = #userHomeAddr# ,user_work_addr = #userWorkAddr# ,distance = #distance# ,dept_cd = #deptCd# ,duty = #duty# ,user_id = #userId# ,user_nm = #userNm# ,state = #state# ,car_get_date = #carGetDate# ,car_dispose_date = #carDisposeDate# ,upt_id = #sessionId# ,upt_dt = getdate() where idx = #carIdx#
sqlMap.select: /* CarMgtDAO.selectCarInfo */ select idx as car_idx , CAR_NO , CAR_TYPE , COM_CD , (SELECT CompanyName FROM SGERP.._TCACompany WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CompanySeq = C.com_cd ) AS com_nm , BIZ_NO , BIZ_YEAR , USER_HOME_ADDR , USER_WORK_ADDR , DISTANCE , DEPT_CD , (SELECT DeptName FROM SGERP.dbo.SG_VHRIFDeptQuery WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE DeptSeq = C.dept_cd and CompanySeq = C.com_cd ) AS dept_nm , DUTY , USER_ID , user_nm , state , convert(varchar(10), car_get_date, 121) car_get_date , convert(varchar(10), car_dispose_date, 121) car_dispose_date , TOT_DIST AS totDist from TB_CAR C WITH(NOLOCK) where idx = #carIdx#

/* CarMgtDAO.selectCarList */ select M.* from ( select idx as car_idx , CAR_NO , CAR_TYPE , convert(varchar(10), car_get_date, 121) car_get_date , convert(varchar(10), car_dispose_date, 121) car_dispose_date , C.COM_CD , (SELECT CompanyName FROM SGERP.._TCACompany WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CompanySeq = C.com_cd ) AS com_nm , C.BIZ_NO , BIZ_YEAR , USER_HOME_ADDR , USER_WORK_ADDR , DISTANCE , C.DEPT_CD , (SELECT DeptName FROM SGERP.dbo.SG_VHRIFDeptQuery WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE DeptSeq = C.dept_cd and CompanySeq = C.com_cd ) AS dept_nm , DUTY , C.USER_ID , C.user_nm , CD.code_name as stateNm , C.state ,row_number() over(order by C.state, ISNULL(TC.SORT, 1000) ) as rno ,count(*) over() as cnt from TB_CAR C WITH(NOLOCK) left join FIM.dbo.tb_user U WITH(NOLOCK) on U.user_id = C.USER_ID left join tb_company TC WITH(NOLOCK) on TC.COM_NO = C.COM_CD left join tb_code CD WITH(NOLOCK) on CD.code = C.state and CD.code_type= 'carState'
INNER JOIN IFRS.dbo.fn_Get_CarUserListView(#sessionId#) CU ON CU.CAR_USERID = C.USER_ID
where C.use_yn = 'Y'
and car_type like '%' + #carType# + '%'
and U.user_nm like '%' + #userNm# + '%'
and C.state = #state#
and CAR_NO like '%' + #carNo# + '%'
and C.COM_CD = #companySeq#
) M where rno between #firstIndex# AND #lastIndex#

/* CarMgtDAO.selectLeaderUserIdBySec */ SELECT DISTINCT STUFF(( SELECT ',' + EXECUTIVE_ID FROM FIM.dbo.TB_SECRETARY TS WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN FIM.dbo.TB_USER TBU WITH(NOLOCK) ON TS.SECRETARY_ID = TBU.USER_ID WHERE TBU.PFLE_STATUS_CD = 'PS10' AND TS.SECRETARY_ID = #sessionId# FOR XML PATH ('') ), 1, 1, '') AS 'userId' FROM FIM.dbo.TB_SECRETARY WITH(NOLOCK)
/* CarMgtDAO.selectLeaderUserId */ SELECT USER_ID as userId FROM FIM.dbo.TB_USER WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE PFLE_STATUS_CD = 'PS10' AND USER_FG_HR = 'E10' AND USER_ID = #sessionId#
sqlMap.update: /* CarMgtDAO.deleteCar */ update tb_car set use_yn = 'N' where idx = #carIdx#
sqlMap.insert: /* CarMgtDAO.insertCarDrive */ insert into tb_car_drive ( CAR_IDX , [YEAR] , DRIVE_DATE , USER_ID , COM_CD , DEPT_CD , DEP_ACC_DIST , ARR_ACC_DIST , DRIVE_DIST , DRIVE_WORK_DIST , DISTANCE , REMARK , INS_ID , INS_DT ) values ( #carIdx# , substring(convert(varchar, #driveDate#, 121), 1, 4) , #driveDate# , #userId# , #comCd# , #deptCd# , round(#depAccDist#, 2) , round(#arrAccDist#, 2) , round(#driveDist#, 2) , round(#driveWorkDist#, 2) , round(#distance#, 2) , #remark# , #sessionId# , getdate() )
sqlMap.update: /* CarMgtDAO.updateCarDrive */ update tb_car_drive set DRIVE_DATE = #driveDate# , year = substring(convert(varchar, #driveDate#, 121), 1, 4) , DEP_ACC_DIST = round(#depAccDist#, 2) , ARR_ACC_DIST = round(#arrAccDist#, 2) , DRIVE_DIST = round(#driveDist#, 2) , DRIVE_WORK_DIST = round(#driveWorkDist#, 2) , DISTANCE = round(#distance#, 2) , REMARK = #remark# , UPT_ID = #sessionId# , UPT_DT = getdate() where drive_idx = #driveIdx# and car_idx = #carIdx# and year = #year#
sqlMap.delete: /* CarMgtDAO.deleteCarDrive */ delete from tb_car_drive where drive_idx = #deleteIdx#
sqlMap.update: /* CarMgtDAO.updateCarTotDist */ UPDATE TB_CAR SET TOT_DIST = #totDist# WHERE idx = #carIdx#
sqlMap.select: /* CarMgtDAO.selectErpComList */ select CompanySeq, CompanyName from SGERP.._TCACompany order by CompanySeq

/* CarMgtDAO.selectErpDeptList */ select M.* ,( select DeptName From sgerp.dbo.SG_VHRIFDeptQuery D WITH(NOLOCK) where DeptSeq = C.UppDeptSeq and CompanySeq = C.CompanySeq ) as upp_dept_nm from ( select (select CompanyName from SGERP.._TCACompany B WITH(NOLOCK) where A.CompanySeq = B.CompanySeq) as comNm ,DeptName ,CompanySeq ,DeptSeq ,isUse ,row_number() over(order by A.CompanySeq, A.Deptname ) as rnum from sgerp.dbo.SG_VHRIFDeptQuery A WITH(NOLOCK) where 1 = 1
and IsUse = '사용'
and companySeq = #companySeq# and deptName like '%' + #searchDept# + '%' ) M left join sgerp.dbo._thrOrgDept C on M.DeptSeq = C.DeptSeq and C.CompanySeq = M.CompanySeq
order by rnum
sqlMap.insert: /* CarMgtDAO.insertCarUserTerm */ insert into tb_car_user_term ( car_idx, user_id, com_cd, dept_cd, str_date, end_date ) values ( #carIdx#, #userId#, #userComCd#, #userDeptCd#, #strDate#, #endDate# )
sqlMap.update: /* CarMgtDAO.updateCarUserTerm */ update tb_car_user_term set user_id = #userId# ,com_cd = #userComCd# ,dept_cd = #userDeptCd# ,str_date = #strDate# ,end_date = #endDate# where term_idx = #termIdx#
sqlMap.select: /* CarMgtDAO.selectCarUserTermList */ select term_idx , CAR_IDX , [USER_ID] , COM_CD , ( select companyName from SGERP.._TCACompany WITH(NOLOCK) where CompanySeq = a.COM_CD ) as com_nm , DEPT_CD , ( select deptName from SGERP..SG_VHRIFDeptQuery WITH(NOLOCK) where CompanySeq = a.COM_CD and deptSeq = a.dept_cd) as dept_nm , STR_DATE , END_DATE from tb_car_user_term a WITH(NOLOCK) where CAR_IDX = #carIdx# order by a.STR_DATE asc
sqlMap.delete:
/* CarMgtDAO.deleteCarUserTerm */ delete from tb_car_user_term where car_idx = #carIdx# and term_idx not in
#termIdx_arr[]#
